scope: P2 secondary reusable location design specs
global_continuity_rules: Grounded eastern epic fantasy with restrained low-magic and realistic worn materials.
P2 locations should be reusable boards for Prompt Room and Director Room, not one-off shot frames.
First-season geography must migrate from steam and ash to wallfoot gray-blue, then into snow, black stone, bone, and broken beacon fire.
Old Zhaoming marks must use the fused Sun-Moon rule: moon-white crescent inside a worn golden sun wheel as one badge.
Sumin/Qingming marks must use the abstract white-wing-over-black-sun rule and must not become literal insect-wing specimens.
Boards should avoid large crowd spectacle and expensive wide battle staging; use set zones, practical entrances, local props, and partial silhouettes.

locations.name: 金河粮磨区
locations.geography: Sumin-controlled productive steam facility along the Jinhe river granary belt.
locations.design_goal: Show that Sumin preserves production steam while deliberately erasing human military engineering capacity.

primary_zones: river-side steam mill wheel and water pump
sealed weapon cellar under the mill
ground-away cannon-mount marks beside old machinery
spatial_layout.entrance_exit_logic: Narrow service alleys and grain tracks allow pursuit staging without large crowds; cellar access should sit below ordinary production machinery.
spatial_layout.scale_rule: Industrial but local, not a modern factory or grand city plant.

locations.lighting_weather: Humid industrial side light with white steam layers, iron gray shadows, and oil-black machinery pockets.
camera_facing_details: close-up of erased measurement marks on old cannon interface
steam occlusion for low-cost chase coverage
boots and grain cart wheels crossing the same track

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical 9:16 location board with establishing mill yard, machinery detail, sealed cellar, erased cannon interface detail, and steam lighting study

continuity_locks: steam technology exists for production only
all military interfaces must look ground away or sealed
palette remains iron gray, steam white, oil black, and grain brown
avoid intact working cannons or clean advanced machinery
locations.downstream_usage: Episode 04 grainmill infiltration, disarmament-order exposition, sealed weapon cellar references, and steam chase blocking.

locations.name: 灰烬书院
locations.geography: Burned human academy and star-chart archive where knowledge survives as ash, fragments, songs, and scorched devices.
locations.design_goal: Make the academy read as destroyed historical memory, not an intact scholarly campus or gothic dungeon.

spatial_layout.entrance_exit_logic: Characters move through broken arches and shelf gaps; child identifier hiding spots are partial and intimate.
spatial_layout.scale_rule: Fragmented archive zones, not a full crowd classroom or grand library hall.

locations.lighting_weather: Dim gray daylight through broken roof with small moon-white star-chart glints and drifting ash.
camera_facing_details: moon-white points on cracked star-chart disk
ash floating in shallow depth of field
sealed shelf corners with child-sized hiding shadow

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical 9:16 location board with burned arcade, black shelf corridor, broken star-chart disk, wax seal detail, and ash lighting study

continuity_locks: knowledge survives only as fragments, songs, and scorched devices
children identifiers should feel institutional and unsettling when referenced
palette remains charcoal black, ash gray, paper yellow, and moon-white glint
star-chart glow must be small and residual
locations.downstream_usage: Episode 05 burned archive exploration, forbidden song clues, identifier child staging, and star-chart clue frames.

locations.name: 墙下集市
locations.geography: Market of stateless mixed people under the southern foot of the border wall.
locations.design_goal: Build a cramped practical survival market that makes exits, wall backs, kiln caves, food tokens, and mixed-heritage marginality visible.

spatial_layout.entrance_exit_logic: Every stall should imply a narrow escape route or blocked passage; wall backs matter for pursuit and betrayal blocking.
spatial_layout.scale_rule: Dense small set with a few implied figures, not a large festive bazaar.

locations.lighting_weather: Dusty side light, gray-blue shadows, clay-brown ground, dull yellow token highlights.
camera_facing_details: hands exchanging food tokens in shadow
gray-blue cloth and pottery charm continuity for Lu Qingli

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical 9:16 location board with cramped alley, awning stalls, kiln cave threshold, token close-up, broken flag strip wall, and exit blocking study

continuity_locks: should feel lived-in, poor, practical, suspicious, and locally organized
mixed-heritage signs stay subtle and non-exoticized
palette remains gray blue, clay brown, patched cloth brown, and dull yellow
avoid large crowd spectacle
locations.downstream_usage: Episode 07 wallfoot market arrival, food-token bargaining, Lu Qingli betrayal/rescue blocking, and new-homeland theme staging.

locations.name: 鸣骨岭
locations.geography: Snow ridge outside the border wall where bones half-buried in snow make flute tones in the wind.
locations.design_goal: Make the location sparse, sound-driven, and intimate, showing disaster memory without turning it into a full northern army scene.

spatial_layout.entrance_exit_logic: Characters cross between snow pits and bone ridges; distant shadows imply risk without wide battle staging.
spatial_layout.scale_rule: Sparse ridge and rescue-scale staging, not a tribe camp.

locations.lighting_weather: Overcast snow light with low ice-blue fire for faces and rust-dark buried metal details.
camera_facing_details: bone holes arranged as wind-sound identity
snow pit edge for rescue blocking
tiny warm bodies against empty cold ridge

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical 9:16 location board with snow ridge, bone-hole detail, snow pit, ice-blue fire, distant herd-shadow silhouette, and sparse lighting study

continuity_locks: use sparse detail and sound identity
northern presence remains limited and intimate
palette remains snow white, bone white, ice blue, and rust dark
avoid full tribe camp or army
locations.downstream_usage: Episode 09 snow ridge crossing, Lu Mi rescue encounter, bone-flute sound motif, and enemy-as-disaster theme frames.

locations.name: 寒鸦堡
locations.geography: Old human fortress converted into an insect military office and controlled by the Armor Army Office.
locations.design_goal: Show occupied human architecture: black-stone fortress bones overlaid with insect membrane corridors, wax-sealed archives, and Sumin military order.

spatial_layout.entrance_exit_logic: Corridors should support tense infiltration and pursuit; archive wall is a clue location, not a decorative backdrop.
spatial_layout.scale_rule: Partial fortress and interior zones, not a siege or pure cave hive.

locations.lighting_weather: Low cold interior light with wet membrane reflections, cold wax white highlights, and black stone mass.
camera_facing_details: membrane reflection as a pursuit corridor cue
wax archive close-up for Shen Jiheng evidence
old human stone seams visible beneath occupation layers

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical 9:16 location board with fortress exterior fragment, insect membrane corridor, interrogation hall, wax archive wall, insignia checkpoint, and cold interior lighting study

continuity_locks: must feel like human architecture occupied by insect governance
archives sealed in wax are a key visual clue
palette remains black stone, cold wax white, dark green shell, and old iron
Sumin insignia follows abstract white-wing-over-black-sun rule
locations.downstream_usage: Episode 10 Hanya Fort infiltration, Shen Jiheng archive reveal, Li Tang military threat staging, and Bai Yi confrontation frames.

locations.name: 坍塌烽燧
locations.geography: Broken old imperial beacon tower connected to the relay escape route and season-one finale flight.
locations.design_goal: Make the finale location feel unstable, stormy, and morally incomplete: escape with treaty fragments, not a restored imperial victory platform.

primary_zones: flag cloth pressed into snow mud
spatial_layout.entrance_exit_logic: Exit should emerge from old relay collapse into snow; tower fragments create near-camera occlusion and forced movement.
spatial_layout.scale_rule: Action climax through close escape and silhouettes, not clean triumph staging.

hero_props_and_dressing: fused Sun-Moon flag cloth pressed into snow mud
locations.lighting_weather: Stormy snow with fire flashes, stone gray collapse dust, black smoke, and brief gold-red residual light.
camera_facing_details: broken flag cloth in snow mud, not held high
falling stone and fire flash as motion anchors

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical 9:16 location board with broken tower, snow escape slope, residual beacon fire, white pursuer silhouette, flag cloth in snow mud, and storm lighting study

continuity_locks: final choice uses broken flag cloth and treaty page, not triumphant full flag
palette remains snow white, stone gray, gold-red ember, and black smoke
ending is stormy and incomplete
old empire is not restored visually
negative_notes: no complete restoration of old empire
no pristine full imperial flag triumph
locations.downstream_usage: Episode 12 relay escape exit, snow confrontation, broken-flag value choice, and season-one final action reference.

assumptions: This is a project-level reusable P2 location pass matching the existing P2 secondary character files, not a detached episode-specific art-room run.
The requested six locations are all priority 2 in bible/location-visual-locks.json and bible/asset-registry.json.
No shot list or story beat is rewritten; the designs only expand existing scene and location locks into image-ready location boards.
quality_notes: Each requested location has one stable v01 board output path under assets/locations/v01.
Each design preserves set zones, entrance/exit logic, material language, lighting, continuity locks, and explicit negative constraints.
